SEE ALL SERVICES →

Who We Are

Decades of Painting Expertise in Colorado Springs

European Painter began with a simple commitment: provide unparalleled painting services with a European attention to detail. Founded by artisans passionate about transforming homes and businesses, we quickly established ourselves as the premier painting company in Colorado Springs.

Our approach is simple: listen to our clients, understand their vision, and execute flawlessly. We use only the highest quality paints and materials, combined with proven techniques, to ensure a lasting and beautiful finish. We pride ourselves on clear communication, respect for your property, and delivering exceptional value.

We're more than just painters; we're part of the Colorado Springs community. We actively support local charities and organizations, believing in giving back to the community that has supported us. We are committed to sustainable practices, minimizing waste and using eco-friendly products whenever possible.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose European Painter

Unmatched Quality

We use premium paints and proven techniques for lasting beauty.

Meticulous Prep Work

Proper preparation is key to a flawless finish; we don't cut corners.

Experienced Professionals

Our team brings years of expertise to every project, big or small.

Clear Communication

We keep you informed every step of the way, ensuring complete satisfaction.

Transform Your Home Today!

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

European Painter did an amazing job painting the interior of my home! They were professional, efficient, and the quality of their work was outstanding. I highly recommend them!

Sarah M. Interior Painting
“

We hired European Painter to paint our house in Broadmoor, and we are very pleased with the results. They did a great job prepping the surface and the paint job looks fantastic. A few minor touch-ups were needed, but they were quick to respond and take care of it.

John B. Exterior Painting
“

My kitchen cabinets were looking old and worn, but European Painter transformed them with their cabinet refinishing service. They look brand new! The team was professional, courteous, and paid attention to every detail.

Emily K. Cabinet Refinishing
“

I had a few holes in my drywall from a recent renovation, and European Painter did an excellent job repairing them. You can't even tell they were ever there! The service was fast, affordable, and the quality was top-notch.

David L. Drywall Repair
“

European Painter removed the popcorn ceiling in my living room, and it made a huge difference! The room looks so much brighter and more modern. The team was professional, efficient, and cleaned up thoroughly after the job was done.

Jessica R. Popcorn Ceiling Removal
“

Our deck was starting to show signs of wear and tear, so we hired European Painter to stain and seal it. They did a great job protecting the wood from the elements, and it looks beautiful again. The price was fair, and the service was excellent.

Michael S. Deck Staining & Sealing

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does interior painting typically take?
The duration depends on the size and complexity of the project. We'll provide a detailed timeline during the consultation, but most projects take between 2-5 days.
Do I need to move my furniture?
We prefer that you remove small items and valuables. We'll carefully cover and protect all remaining furniture and belongings.
What type of paint do you use?
We use only high-quality paints from trusted brands like Sherwin-Williams and Benjamin Moore. We can recommend specific paints based on your needs and preferences.
